headline: Tesla Surges 5%: Delivery Hopes, Terafab, and SpaceX Buzz Are All Converging at Once
summary: Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA) shares are up 5% in Tuesday’s session, trading around $373 after opening at $355.28. Three distinct catalysts landed within the same 24-hour window, and the market is treating their convergence as meaningful. That kind of stacked narrative is rare, and it explains why the move has legs even against a difficult recent backdrop. ... Tesla Surges 5%: Delivery Hopes, Terafab, and SpaceX Buzz Are All Converging at Once

headline: Robinhood’s SpaceX Access Scare And What It Signals For Future IPOs
summary: Reports surfaced that Robinhood Markets (NasdaqGS:HOOD) might be excluded from the retail allocation of a potential SpaceX IPO. Elon Musk publicly denied this, stating that retail-focused platforms such as Robinhood would not be excluded. The sequence raised questions, then offered clarity, around how retail investors could access a widely watched private company listing. Robinhood runs a commission free trading app aimed at giving retail investors access to stocks, ETFs, options and...
